title: Regression with query condition cache on Memory engine in 25.10
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
I believe there is a regression in the query condition cache for Memory engine databases starting in 25.10 (I'm testing with `Connected to ClickHouse server version 25.10.3`. The below SQL repros it for me:
```
DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS bug_repro;
CREATE DATABASE bug_repro ENGINE = Memory;
USE bug_repro;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS analytics_log_in
(
`time` DateTime DEFAULT now(),
`shard_id` String,
`user_email` String,
`user_impersonated` Boolean
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY (`time`);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS analytics_session_timeline_viewed
(
`time` DateTime DEFAULT now(),
`shard_id` String,
`user_email` String,
`session_id` String,
`user_impersonated` Boolean
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY (`time`);
INSERT INTO analytics_log_in VALUES
('2020-10-15 01:00:00', 'id1', 'email', false);
INSERT INTO analytics_session_timeline_viewed VALUES
('2020-11-15 01:00:00', 'id1', 'email', 'session_id', false);
SELECT COUNT(*) as count
FROM analytics_log_in
WHERE
time >= toStartOfMonth(toDateTime(1604142000, 'UTC')) AND
time < addMonths(toStartOfMonth(toDateTime(1604142000, 'UTC')), 1) AND
shard_id = 'id1' AND
user_impersonated = false;
SELECT COUNT(*) as count
FROM analytics_log_in
WHERE
time >= toStartOfMonth(toDateTime(1606737600, 'UTC')) AND
time < addMonths(toStartOfMonth(toDateTime(1606737600, 'UTC')), 1) AND
shard_id = 'id1' AND
user_impersonated = false;
SELECT COUNT(*) as count
FROM analytics_session_timeline_viewed
WHERE
time >= toStartOfMonth(toDateTime(1604142000, 'UTC')) AND
time < addMonths(toStartOfMonth(toDateTime(1604142000, 'UTC')), 1) AND
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE analytics_log_in (time DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, shard_id TEXT, user_email TEXT, user_impersonated BOOLEAN);
CREATE TABLE analytics_session_timeline_viewed (time DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, shard_id TEXT, user_email TEXT, session_id TEXT, user_impersonated BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO analytics_log_in (time, shard_id, user_email, user_impersonated) VALUES ('2020-10-15 01:00:00', 'id1', 'email', 0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analytics_log_in WHERE time >= DATE('2020-10-01') AND time < DATE('2020-11-01') AND shard_id = 'id1' AND user_impersonated = 0;
key_bug_features: Regression in query condition cache for Memory engine
